name: Freedom Preserving Protocol — Enforcement
description: Registers a before_tool_call hook that gates tool calls against the five Freedom Preserving Laws. Returns block or requireApproval based on a configurable risk classifier; writes hash-chained audit entries to .openclaw/workspace/fpp-plugin-audit.jsonl.

auditLogPath.description: Path to the dispatcher-layer audit log. Default: .openclaw/workspace/fpp-plugin-audit.jsonl

blockOn.description: Classification ids that should be hard-blocked (block: true). See plugin/src/risk-classifier.ts for the full taxonomy.

approvalOn.description: Classification ids that should require user approval (requireApproval). Anything not in blockOn or approvalOn is allowed.

approvalTimeoutMs.description: How long to wait for user approval before defaulting (per approvalTimeoutBehavior).

approvalTimeoutBehavior.description: What to do if approval times out. Default 'deny' is conservative (Law 1).

constitutionHash.description: SHA-256 of the constitution.json being enforced. Recorded in every audit entry.

strictModeStatePath.description: Path to the strict-mode state file written by the trust plugin. Read on each before_tool_call.

respectTrustStrictMode.description: When true, reads the trust plugin's strict-mode state and escalates matching classifications to require-approval.
